compiled_state.title: create-dso-app.sh: dependency not in PATH -> erroneous missing detection and no auto-install
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
Script prompts user to manually type install commands instead of using homebrew automatically. Also erroneously detects dependencies as missing when they are installed but not on PATH, and does not update PATH after installing via homebrew.

comments.body: Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed
comments.author: Test
